channel.title: Supplements
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Supplements, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: RHR: The Gut-Brain Connection: How Your Microbiome Affects Your Mental Health
item.description: Depression and anxiety are often treated as chemical imbalances in the brain—but what if the real problem starts in the gut? In this episode of Revolu...

item.title: Magnesium Bisglycinate Use Surges, with Albion® Leading the Magnesium Boom
item.description: Magnesium use has exploded . The data speak for itself: Over one billion views on the #magnesium TikTok hashtag. A 34% compound annual growth rate for...
